pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: This is not a border ritual. Someone taught him structure.

pre_mission.speaker: Aric
pre_mission.line: Then we end it here and take whatever answers remain.

pre_mission.speaker: Kain
pre_mission.line: Answers are useful. Keep the evidence intact.

post_mission.speaker: Brother Thane
post_mission.line: This royal cipher should not exist outside the vault. Not in the field. Not like this.

post_mission.speaker: Brother Thane
post_mission.line: Not cleanly. Either someone stole the court's authority... or the court gave it.

tag_scene.speaker: The Lord Marshall's Letter
tag_scene.line: Trust no one beyond your command. Move for Ashfield Pass. Burn what must be burned before it reaches the heart.

tag_scene.speaker: Kain
tag_scene.line: Fresh seal. Same ash smell. Someone wants you walking into fire with your eyes closed.

tag_scene.speaker: Aric
tag_scene.line: Then we walk in with eyes open.
